reviews.review_title: This is an experience not to be missed
reviews.review_description: I watched a YouTuber play it awhile ago on flat screen, but flatscreen doesn’t feel as intense as the vr version, the game is methodical and having to reload using your mouth is brilliantly implemented I actually felt like a one armed action hero… and my parasites names Perry now… highly recommend!!.

Please create mobile ￼ version of this game 
make a mobile version
On the fourth level when you get the gun the gun is not working

reviews.review_title: Very good, with a few bugs
reviews.review_description: I played the original on steam, and this is basically a perfect port, at least to me. I finished the game on the normal difficulty, and there was one really bad bug that happened. I got to the part where the “predator” enemy starts appearing, and I hit the save button and got off for a while. When I came back to play again, it kept crashing whenever I would load my save. I had to restart the whole game, which is kind of stupid, but I was going to replay it anyway. All the guns are really fun, and they all had good uses, also the reloading is very creative. Love the gorilla tag based movement. Overall a very good game.
Just want to be one of the first to review the game, it's still really fun some saves get you stuck behind a wall and fall under a map
